# Nutrionista Balsamiq Mockup â€” Per-Page Analysis

**Source:** `docs/Nutrionista balsamiq.pdf` (14 pages)
**Generated by:** `read-pdf-areas` skill on 2026-05-15
**How to read this:** each page of the mockup gets one section below. The table at the top of each section is the technical sticky-note from the right side of the page (Vue filename, route, API contract). Everything below the table describes what's visible in the wireframe.

## Summary

| Page | Title | Vue file | URL |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Landing / Home | `HomeView.vue` | `/home` |
| 2 | Sisselogimine / Registreerimine | `LoginView.vue` | `/login` |
| 3 | Vitamiinitest (quiz) | `QuizView.vue` | `/quiz` |
| 4 | Personaalne vitamiiniprofiil | `ProfileView.vue` | `/profile` |
| 5 | Soovikorv (wishlist) | `WishlistView.vue` | `/wishlist` |
| 6 | E-pood (shop) | `ShopView.vue` | `/shop` |
| 7 | Toote detailvaade (product detail) | `ProductDetailView.vue` | *(blank)* |
| 8 | Ostukorv (cart) | `CartView.vue` | `/cart` |
| 9 | Kassa (checkout) | `CheckoutView.vue` | `/checkout` |
| 10 | Tellimus kinnitatud (confirmation) | `???.vue` | `/???` |
| 11 | Tellimuste ajalugu (order history) | `OrderHistoryView.vue` | `/orderhistory` |
| 12 | Blogi / Artiklid | `BlogView.vue` | `/blog` |
| 13 | Tagasiside & Kontakt | `ContactView.vue` | `/contact` |
| 14 | KKK (FAQ) | `FaqView.vue` | `/faq` |

**Mockup-wide design tokens (consistent across pages):**

- **Header / footer band** â€” light green (`#e0ffe0`), full width, used on every page.
- **Primary CTA** â€” bright pink (`#e6007a`), used for the dominant action on each page ("Lisa ostukorvi", "Mine maksma", "Kinnita tellimus", "Logi sisse", "Tagasi avalehele", "Loe edasi", "Saada tagasiside", etc.).
- **Secondary CTA** â€” light green (`#90ee90`), used for "Loo uus konto" on the login page; otherwise rare.
- **Background** â€” light gray (`#f8f8f8`) for the main canvas.
- **Sticky-note convention** â€” yellow rectangle with a red "tape" on top; left sticky describes page purpose in Estonian, right sticky carries the technical metadata.

## Page 1 â€” Landing / Home

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Vue file | `HomeView.vue` |
| URL | `/home` |
| API | *(blank)* |
| DTO | *(blank)* |
| Response | *(blank)* |
| Error codes | *(blank)* |

**Purpose:** Welcome visitors with the Nutrionista logo, top navigation, and a highlighted-products grid for direct browsing into the catalog.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band (top, light green) with brand wordmark left + nav links right (`Avaleht`, `Tooted`, `Minu konto`, `Ostukorv`).
- Hero section (centered): H1 welcome heading + tagline.
- "EsiletĂµstetud Tooted" section: a 4-card product grid.
- Footer band (light green) with copyright "Â© 2023 Nutrionista".

**Colors observed:**
- Light green (`#e0ffe0`) â€” header and footer bands.
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” "Vaata lĂ¤hemalt" CTA buttons under each product card, and the price text.
- Gray placeholder rectangles for product images (image asset not embedded in the mockup).

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 top-level nav (4 links).
- 1 hero heading + 1 paragraph below it.
- 4 product cards arranged in a horizontal row; each card has image placeholder, product name, short description, price, "Vaata lĂ¤hemalt" button.
- 1 footer band.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- "Tere tulemast Nutrionistasse!"
- "Avasta parimad vitamiinid ja toidulisandid oma tervise toetamiseks."
- "EsiletĂµstetud Tooted"
- Product names: "Vitamiin A" (12.99 â‚¬), "Vitamiin C" (9.50 â‚¬), "Vitamiin D" (15.00 â‚¬), "B-kompleks" (18.75 â‚¬).
- Each card has "Vaata lĂ¤hemalt".

**Notes:** The sticky-note URL says `/home`, but Vue Router convention (and the existing `frontend/src/router/index.js` in the repo) typically maps the home page to `/`, not `/home`. Small inconsistency the team should resolve. The Rev. 3 spec drops the "featured" concept and uses "4 newest in-stock" as the selection rule â€” the mockup still uses the word "EsiletĂµstetud" ("featured"), which is fine as a *label*, but the underlying query is now `created_at DESC + in_stock = true LIMIT 4`.

## Page 2 â€” Sisselogimine / Registreerimine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Vue file | `LoginView.vue` |
| URL | `/login` |
| API | `POST /api/login` |
| DTO | `LoginDto.java` â€” `{ "email": "...", "password": "..." }` |
| Response | `LoginResponseDto.java` â€” `{ "userId", "firstName", "middleName", "lastName", "role" }` |
| Error codes | `200 OK` (success); `401 Unauthorized` â†’ user message "Vale email vĂµi parool"; `400 Bad Request` (missing fields) â†’ user message "Palun tĂ¤itke kĂµik vĂ¤ljad" |

**Purpose:** Let users log in to an existing account or create a new one. The mockup combines both flows on a single screen.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band (no nav on the right â€” only "Avaleht" link, since the user isn't logged in).
- Centered card panel containing the form.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Light green (`#e0ffe0`) â€” header / footer.
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” "Logi sisse" primary button.
- Light green (`#90ee90`) â€” "Loo uus konto" secondary button (only place in the whole mockup where the secondary green is the dominant CTA).
- White panel on the gray page background.

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 H1 "Sisselogimine / Registreerimine".
- 2 text inputs: "E-posti aadress" + "Parool".
- 1 primary button "Logi sisse".
- 1 horizontal "vĂµi" divider.
- 1 secondary button "Loo uus konto".

**Visible text (key strings):**
- "Sisselogimine / Registreerimine"
- "E-posti aadress"
- "Parool"
- "Logi sisse" / "vĂµi" / "Loo uus konto"

**Notes:** **This page contradicts Rev. 3 of the spec.** Rev. 3 (Â§6) explicitly drops authentication entirely â€” no `/login`, no `LoginView.vue`, no admin filter, no `LoginDto`. The sticky-note here documents the original auth design (email-based login, ADMIN role in response, BCrypt-implied), which would be the implementation if/when auth is reintroduced. The right-side sticky is therefore valuable as **the documented API contract for the future auth revision** referenced in spec Â§6.

**Purpose:** Interactive questionnaire about the user's lifestyle, diet, and health, used to offer personalized vitamin recommendations.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band with full nav.
- Centered card panel containing 5 question groups, each with multiple-choice options.
- "Esita vastused" primary submit button.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” full-width "Esita vastused" submit button at the bottom.
- White panel on light gray background.
- Black radio dots for selection.

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 H1 "Vitamiinitest" + 1 lead paragraph.
- 5 question blocks; each has a numbered question text + 2-5 radio options.
- 1 free-text input at the end ("Kirjelda lĂĽhidalt (valikuline)").
- 1 full-width primary submit button.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- Q1: "Kui tihti tarbid piimatooteid?" â†’ Iga pĂ¤e / Mitu korda nĂ¤dalas / Harva / Ei tarbi ĂĽldse
- Q2: "Kas oled taimetoitlane vĂµi vegan?" â†’ Jah, vegan / Jah, taimetoitlane / Ei
- Q3: "Kui tihti viibid pĂ¤ikese kĂ¤es (ilma pĂ¤ikesekaitsekreemita)?" â†’ 4 options
- Q4: "Kas tunned tihti vĂ¤simust vĂµi energiapuudust?" â†’ 4 options
- Q5: "Kas sul on mingeid kroonilisi haigusi vĂµi vĂµtad regulaarselt ravimeid?" + free text
- "Esita vastused"

**Notes:** Out of scope per Rev. 3 Â§14 ("vitamiinitest" explicitly cut). Mockup is here as the longer-term backlog. Q1 and Q3 each have a typo: "Iga pĂ¤e" should presumably be "Iga pĂ¤ev". If the quiz is built later, fix at seed time.

**Purpose:** Show a logged-in user's risk profile, vitamin recommendations, currently-owned vitamins, and reorder reminders. Acts as a personal dashboard.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band with full nav.
- H1 "Personaalne vitamiiniprofiil".
- 3-column panel layout: "Sinu riskid" (deficiencies) / "Soovitused" (recommendations) / "Ostetud vitamiinid" (purchases + reorder UI).
- Bottom action row: 3 link buttons â€” "Tellimuste ajalugu", "Soovikorv", "Ostukorvi".
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” section headings inside each card ("Sinu riskid", "Soovitused", "Ostetud vitamiinid"), and the "Telli uuesti" buttons on the purchased items.
- Light green (`#90ee90`) â€” "Tellimuste ajalugu" and "Soovikorv" bottom buttons.
- White card panels on gray page.

**Shapes / components:**
- 3 column cards.
- Risk list: 3 bullet items.
- Recommendation list: 4 bullet items.
- Purchased-items list: 2 rows, each with thumbnail + product name + "JĂ¤rgmine meeldetuletus: ..." date + pink "Telli uuesti" button.
- 3 bottom buttons.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- Risks: "D-vitamiini puudus (madal pĂ¤ikese kĂ¤es viibimine)" / "B12-vitamiini puudus (taimetoitlus)" / "Rauapuudus (rasked menstruatsioonid)"
- Recommendations: "D-vitamiin 2000 IU pĂ¤evas" / "B12-vitamiin 1000 mcg nĂ¤dalas" / "Rauapreparaat koos C-vitamiiniga" / "Magneesium Ăµhtuti paremaks uneks"
- Purchased: "D-vitamiin 2000 IU" (reorder 15.11.2023), "Magneesiumtsitraat" (reorder 01.12.2023)

**Notes:** Out of scope per Rev. 3 â€” depends on (a) auth (no logged-in user concept exists) and (b) the quiz output for the risks/recommendations columns. Three features stacked into one screen; if revived later, this is the integration target.

The `Kategooria`, `Hind`, and `Sorteeri` controls are in scope.

## Page 7 â€” Toote detailvaade (Product Detail)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Vue file | `ProductDetailView.vue` |
| URL | *(blank)* |
| API | *(blank)* |
| DTO | *(blank)* |
| Response | *(blank)* |
| Error codes | *(blank)* |

**Purpose:** Show the selected vitamin's full educational profile â€” functions, absorption methods, interactions, and deficiency symptoms â€” plus the "Add to cart" CTA. This is the wow moment of the demo.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band with full nav.
- 2-column main: **left** = image placeholder + product name + short description + price + "Lisa ostukorvi" CTA; **right** = 4 stacked information sections.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” large price "XX.XX â‚¬" and full-width "Lisab ostukorvi" CTA.
- Three interaction-dot colors:
  - đźź˘ **green** dot â€” "Hea" (enhances)
  - đźźˇ **yellow** dot â€” "Neutraalne" (neutral)
  - đź”´ **red** dot â€” "Halb" (inhibits)
- Black bullet points for the educational lists.

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 image placeholder + 1 H1 + 1 lead paragraph + 1 price + 1 button (left column).
- 4 H2 sections (right column): "Funktsioonid", "Imendumismeetodid", "Koostoimed", "Puuduse sĂĽmptomid".
- Bulleted lists under Funktsioonid (3 items), Imendumismeetodid (2 items), Puuduse sĂĽmptomid (3 items).
- The Koostoimed section is a 3-row mini-table: nutrient name + dot + label.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- "Vitamiin Nimi" / "LĂĽhikirjeldus vitamiini kohta." / "XX.XX â‚¬"
- "Lisab ostukorvi"
- "Funktsioonid" â†’ "Toetab immuunsĂĽsteemi", "Aitab kaasa energia tootmisele", "Oluline luude tervisele"
- "Imendumismeetodid" â†’ "Rasvlahustuv", "Vajab D-vitamiini"
- "Koostoimed" â†’ "C-vitamiin: đźź˘ Hea", "Raud: đźźˇ Neutraalne", "Tsink: đź”´ Halb"
- "Puuduse sĂĽmptomid" â†’ "VĂ¤simus", "NĂµrk immuunsĂĽsteem", "LihasnĂµrkus"

**Notes:** **This page is the implementation target for Task 2 in the user's queue.** The three colored-dot labels (Hea / Neutraalne / Halb) map directly to the `color_codes` lookup table from Â§5 of the spec. Hea = ENHANCES (green), Halb = INHIBITS (red), Neutraalne corresponds to either SYNERGISTIC or REQUIRES (Rev. 3 introduced `NEUTRAL` as an `effect_type`, distinct from interaction types). The mockup uses three of the four interaction colors â€” REQUIRES (typically rendered blue in the spec) is not shown on this example page. The URL field is also blank â€” the spec uses `/product/:id`.

| API | *(blank)* |
| DTO | *(blank)* |
| Response | *(blank)* |
| Error codes | *(blank)* |

**Purpose:** Show the user's selected items with quantities and total, with controls to remove or adjust quantities.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band with full nav.
- H1 "Ostukorv".
- Stack of cart rows (image + name + price Ă— qty + "Eemalda" button).
- Total row + pink "Mine maksma" CTA bottom-right.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” "Eemalda" pill button per row, "Mine maksma" CTA, total price.
- White rows on light gray background.

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 H1.
- 3 cart rows; each has: thumbnail (X-marked placeholder), product name, "<price> â‚¬ x <qty>" with the qty editable, and pink "Eemalda" button on the right.
- 1 summary row with bold "Koguhind:" + total in pink.
- 1 pink "Mine maksma" CTA.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- "Vitamiin A" 12.50 â‚¬ Ă— 2
- "Vitamiin B kompleks" 25.00 â‚¬ Ă— 1
- "Vitamiin C" 8.75 â‚¬ Ă— 3
- "Koguhind: 81.25 â‚¬"
- "Mine maksma"

**Notes:** Math check: 12.50Ă—2 + 25.00Ă—1 + 8.75Ă—3 = 25 + 25 + 26.25 = **76.25 â‚¬**, but the mockup shows **81.25 â‚¬**. The mockup total is mathematically wrong by 5 â‚¬. Minor â€” just a sticky-note designer's arithmetic slip â€” but the implementation's `cart.total` getter must compute correctly, not copy the mockup.

**Purpose:** Collect shipping and payment information to complete the order.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band â€” note the nav is reduced to just "Avaleht" + "Ostukorv" (no full nav during checkout).
- H1 "Kassa".
- Two stacked card panels: "Tarneandmed" (6 fields) and "Makseandmed" (3 fields).
- Pink full-width "Kinnita tellimus" CTA.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” "Kinnita tellimus" CTA.
- White cards on gray background.
- Standard text-input gray borders.

**Shapes / components:**
- Tarneandmed: 6 text inputs â€” TĂ¤isnimi, Aadress, Linn, Postiindeks, E-post, Telefon.
- Makseandmed: 3 text inputs â€” Kaardi number ("XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX" placeholder), Kehtivusaeg "MM/AA", CVV "XXX".
- 1 full-width primary submit button.

**Visible text (key strings):**
- "Kassa"
- All shipping field labels and placeholders
- "Makseandmed" / "Kaardi number" / "Kehtivusaeg (MM/AA)" / "CVV"
- "Kinnita tellimus"

**Notes:** **The "Makseandmed" card section contradicts Rev. 3 Â§14.** The spec explicitly cuts "Real payments" â€” "The checkout collects shipping info only â€” no card capture, no payment provider." Implementation should omit the entire `Makseandmed` panel; collect only the shipping fields. If kept for visual fidelity to the mockup, the fields must be non-functional and never POSTed.

Math check: 15.00Ă—2 + 25.50Ă—1 = 55.50 âś“ â€” this total is correct (unlike the cart-page mockup). When Task 1 ships, this is the route to wire into the `POST /api/orders` response.

**Purpose:** Let users send feedback through a form, or contact the store directly (email/phone/address), with a placeholder for a future live chat.

**Layout areas:**
- Header band with full nav.
- H1 "Tagasiside & Kontakt".
- 2-column main: **left** = feedback form (Nimi, E-post, SĂµnum textarea, Saada tagasiside button); **right** = "VĂµta meiega ĂĽhendust" info + "Live Chat (tulevikus)" placeholder card.
- Footer band.

**Colors observed:**
- Pink (`#e6007a`) â€” "Saada tagasiside" CTA.
- White cards on gray.
- A small chat-bubble icon in the Live Chat placeholder (rendered in green).

**Shapes / components:**
- 1 H1.
- Left card: 2 text inputs + 1 textarea + 1 full-width pink submit.
- Right card: 3 icon-prefixed contact lines (email, phone, address), section heading "Live Chat (tulevikus)", and a centered placeholder with the chat icon + "Live chat funktsionaalsus on arendamisel ja lisatakse peagi!".

- "Live Chat (tulevikus)" / "Live chat funktsionaalsus on arendamisel ja lisatakse peagi!"

**Notes:** Out of scope per Rev. 3 Â§14 â€” "Cut. Show a static contact-info page only as a stretch." If a static contact-info page is built as a stretch, drop the feedback form and the live-chat placeholder; keep only the right-column contact info.

- 4 section cards, each with 2 Q&A pairs.

**Notes:** Out of scope per Rev. 3 Â§14 â€” "Cut from the data modelâ€¦ A static FAQ Vue component is acceptable as a Day 12-13 stretch goal." If kept as a stretch, hardcode the content shown here into a single `FaqView.vue` component; do not back it with the `faq_items` table or the `FaqItemController` (which Rev. 3 says to delete).

## Mockup vs. Rev. 3 spec â€” quick reconciliation

| Mockup page | Rev. 3 status | What to build |
|---|---|---|
| 1 Home | âś… in scope | The wireframe, minus the "featured" label semantics |
| 2 Login | âťŚ auth dropped | Do NOT build. Sticky note is preserved as the future auth contract |
| 3 Quiz | âťŚ cut | Do NOT build |
| 4 Profile | âťŚ depends on auth | Do NOT build |
| 5 Wishlist | âťŚ cut | Do NOT build |
| 6 Shop | âš ď¸Ź partial | Build the grid + Kategooria/Hind/Sorteeri filters. **Drop the BrĂ¤nd / EesmĂ¤rk dropdowns and the entire "Populaarsed tootekomplektid" bundle section.** |
| 7 Product Detail | âś… in scope, Task 2 | Build per the wireframe; this is the demo's "wow moment" |
| 8 Cart | âś… in scope | Build per wireframe; ignore the 81.25 â‚¬ mockup total math error |
| 9 Checkout | âš ď¸Ź partial | Build "Tarneandmed" only. **Drop the entire "Makseandmed" panel** â€” Rev. 3 cuts card capture |
| 10 Confirmation | âś… in scope | Wire to `/confirmation/:id` after Task 1 ships. Conventional Vue filename: `ConfirmationView.vue` |
| 11 Order History | âťŚ cut | Do NOT build |
| 12 Blog | âťŚ cut | Do NOT build; delete existing `BlogView.vue` and friends in Rev. 3 cleanup |
| 13 Contact | âťŚ cut | Optional stretch; if kept, info-only (no form, no chat) |
| 14 FAQ | âťŚ cut | Optional stretch; hardcoded `FaqView.vue`, no backend |

## Mockup-wide observations worth fixing

- **Several totals on the mockup don't add up** (Cart page off by 5 â‚¬, Order History off by 1 cent). Designer arithmetic slips; implementation must compute totals, never hard-code.
- **Three CTAs say "Lisab ostukorvi"** (inflected) where they probably mean **"Lisa ostukorvi"** (imperative): Home page cards, Wishlist cards, Product Detail. Fix in the Estonian copy on the implemented pages.
- **Quiz Q1 and Q3 typo** â€” "Iga pĂ¤e" should be "Iga pĂ¤ev". Only relevant if the quiz comes back from the backlog.
- **Page 10's sticky is intentionally blank** (`???.vue`, `/???`). The spec answers it (`ConfirmationView.vue`, `/confirmation/:id`).
- **The `/home` vs `/` and `/orderhistory` vs `/order-history` URL differences** between the mockup and the implemented Vue Router are minor naming drift to resolve in one place.
